playStoreReviews.text: bad app, after created acount successful, I cannot login, stop at "Redirecting to ...." and also my bank has been locked online access because app always asked link to bank many times even I have successful linked. I don't not sure this app a scam?
I'd like to be able to monitor my sandbox account also. access to APIs would be great too.
Couldn't even create an account without the page freezing on me. *Killed* my confidence instantly.
love the format the ease of use
This app is not for options. It's extremely difficult to place orders. checking order status, checking PDT status or remaining trades. And the UI is from the stone age as well.
I cant read the login screen and its not readable . very glitchy
Can't get it together. Frequent inability to trade across the app, stupid changes to "policy", insanely wrong account balances etc.

stupid, always loved out then when you try to log back in you will need to check your email again. Everything you logged out. But when you check for authorization code no emailsen to you for the code after many resend code requests This app is anointing
Horrible- stock price isn't displayed in position overview. Most important detail needed, why this isn't a basic feature makes this app almost useless.
It would be great if the app supported grouping legs into strategies. Other than that it's quite good, it looks nice and it's fast
Absolutely NOT happy with Tradier so many issues with them I don't know where to start. I would not recommend them if you are a trader.
The app is great there just isn't a section to deposit or withdraw making the app worthless
The app is thin on functionality. It feels thrown together.
poor UI & ability to track P/L vs other brokerages.
Simple interface, easy to learn, has all the information I need.
Garbage app. High fees. Closed my accounts here and recommend everyone else do the same
not user friendly. needs lot of work
Major trouble..issues in getting signed in
I don't see why anyone would use this over other brokers that have less fees
This company completely disabled my access to buy stocks. What a worthless company.
Terrible brokerage do not apply they will steal your money
Useless app.. Wish I could. Give it 0 stars.
easy to use
Awesome platform and service.. k
Horrible broker who lets big corporations push it around. Avoid at all cost if you want issues in the future
I'll give you 4 stars for an actual dark mode...
very bad interface
The producers were unable to project or open a planned seminar to describe services. Totally discouraging.
Fees are excessive
Worse than previous app
New app sucks
fast
EXOSTING
slow
Wah
I love you too so much Jan.G
nice 💯💯💯💯
Trash broker
Thank
Landkdnddi

Video watching is broken as hell, and it's been like this for years. Multiple videos play at the same time, ads are way way louder than the rest of the video, and ads get stuck and keep you from watching the video (after you watch the ad, of course). It claims that you have a new message at the top corner all of the time, even if you already read the message. The algorithm is also intentionally showing you content that it knows you don't want to see.

For an app that's supposed to keep you in the loop with friends and family, it does a really bad job at it. 90% of my feed is ad and suggested content. If I scroll through 20 posts, only a handful are from my friends. I don't even see half the content they post. Not to mention the notifications are useless. Why am I getting a notification about a post made 3-4 DAYS ago?? I have a few dozen friends that I'd like to keep up to date with, but this app makes that almost impossible. Waste of time.

It was fine while I had access. Someone hacked in and changed my email address. I reported it, and I never got a response. Update: the account was "recovered". All my friends were deleted and all that was left was my one profile picture. Now everytime I open the app, I get an error message and the app doesn't work. UNINSTALLED. It's not like they provide any useful services.

The amount of ads is insane (it didn't used to be), you don't see your friends much and their algorithm ensures you only see a few friends in your feed even if you have hundreds. The rest is ads. There are also a lot of disgusting ads showing nudity, which they claim goes against their standards, but I've reported them dozens of times and have yet for them to actually remove one. If it wasn't for the connections I have through the app, I wouldn't use it. I'll definitely ensure my kids never do.

At the bare minimum, it's a site that lets you have people on your friends list. Beyond that, it's largely unusable. 8 out of every 10 posts is an ad or a group you don't follow and didn't ask to see. The app's UI is wonky and sometimes doesn't let you see notifications. The site is flooded with AI posts by bot accounts that exist only to make money for the account farm makers. The site (and all meta apps) seemingly killed of TikTok in the US to turn their platforms into it. Hard pass.

The ads. I can't do it anymore. I will see one post from a friend, then an ad, then a suggestion of an add or a group I should join, and then another ad. I am so over it. I've had Facebook since 2008 and every year it just seems to get worse. What started as a place where friends could post about their happenings in life and keep up with others has now turn into a giant online ad campaign. I hardly use the app anymore because of the ads. I go days without checking it.

I'm glad that there is a separate friends tab to see a friends only feed. Have joined some great facebook groups. Has a lot of great features now. But there are still a few bugs and glitches here and there that need to be fixed. Ads can be really interruptive during videos, search bar glitches sometimes, and for some reason I am not getting notifications whenever someone likes or reacts to my posts. How can that be fixed?!

only some videos can be muted, and that is never an option if you're playing music from an app that you pay for. I have some other issues as far as how complicated the navigation of the mobile app is. two stars for variety of content. I left a bad review and suddenly nothing wants to load even though my signal strength, both wifi and mobile data, are perfectly adequate. Suspicious.

Is this software even tested? Between this and messenger, you guys have the longest lasting bugs. How long are we going to deal with this one where If an ad comes on, and then you switch the video, and then you go back, you've got the video playing in back of the ad? I'm hoping this one lasts less than the year plus that it took to fix the image orientation issue in messenger... honestly, I understand this is a complex ecosystem. With the money that FB pulls in, obvious bugs shouldn't release.

It's crazy how much data this app collects from my device usage OUTSIDE the app for ad targeting. The settings interface to change what data it can collect is not user-friendly at all. If someone isn't tech savy, they would have a hard time finding and adjusting ad and privacy settings. I feel like the settings menu was set up this way purposely. One shouldn't have to google how to change a setting in the app.

Constantly freezes and shuts down. They never seem to fix the issues. I'll have a decent run, then suddenly my phone starts freezing all because, surprise! FB has a bug again! Maybe it's just an android issue, but it shouldn't be an ongoing problem. I've asked other people who also have androids, and they have the same issues.

Facebook games are very unstable!!!! I play Ludo World often and it's a great game but it force closes and glitches too often. Fix this please. If you're going to offer games on the app they should work!!! Also the number of ads is ridiculous!!! ESPECIALLY when I watch the whole ad then get kicked out of the game before I get the reward and have to watch it a second or sometime 3rd time to get the rewards!! Its like you're tricking people into watching multiple ads for nothing!!! DIRTY TACTICS!!

Forced ads in the middle of a video or short isn't the way... super irritating and completely unacceptable to me. I spend 99% of my time watching videos if I'm on Facebook, and I will not be doing it anymore until forced ads are removed. I don't mind seeing them when I am scrolling through videos, but pausing a video to make me watch an ad is ridiculous.

Soft locks my Phone constantly. Adpocalypse. Banner ads with fake X buttons. Banner ads placed in such a way to get accidental clicks. Facebook reels have a "Next Video" feature that gives you 5-10 seconds to cancel (First click never works, almost by design) or it will ignore the rest of that reel and scroll onto the next one before it is even finished. Every time the next video is an ad. Yes, it skips the video you're trying to watch, for an Advertisement. Uninstalled, good job.

I can't stand the Of course no response and no fixes. Marketplace when in local brings up items from across the US before local ads. When searching for an item, it should bring up that item regardless of location starting from the closest one, not everything else not related. When scrolling through local items I can be 50 items down, click an item to view it and when going back to the list it starts at the top again. Frustrating! No way to contact Facebook to report

What happened to the "X" in the right hand corner? Seems like the last update on my Android device, it has dissappeared Plus, really annoying that my feed has single photo posts from people, groups, and Pages, I follow, that had been part of a larger post earlier. Mo content with them. really useless Facebook. Another very annoying aspect of Facebook in general is the suggested items that pop into my feed almost endlessly that I click to never show again. Stop with the suggested feed items.

Having lots of bugs and changes I dislike. 1. when I click on the link to view a reel that was shared by my friend, which shows up in my feed, I would like to be able to go back and like what my friend shared, but as soon as I go back, my feed gets refreshed, and it disappears. 2. We used to enjoy reposting reels that are funny to our own feed (by hitting share now or share instantly) but these are no longer showing as playable reels, instead it's a link to the reel. It's almost not worth it.

facebook offers no tech support. I could not access my page when I got a new phone due to its being born on a now defunct email. no help whatsoever to switch that page to a different email. after hours of dead-ends, I gave up and made a new page. over 700 friends, no way to tell them that I have a new page. they think I've been hacked because we've been trained not to accept friend requests from folks we're already friends with. and now I can't add friends because Facebook has a limit on that.

Account I have had for nearly 20yrs with all of my media, dead relatives, friends and colleagues, networks and memories are all gone because AI flagged a post for some reason and my account was suspended and under review (3-5 days is how long they say it takes) it has now been 7 months, no response, no help, no number to call, nothing. As someone who has many businesses and spends thousands on the platform in advertising it is so sad to see the human connection is gone and there is zero help.

This app has many glitches. For one thing I can't use the name pronunciation option anymore. I deleted it and tried to add a new one and it just errors for no reason. It also has a glitch where you search a band or musician and it doesn't have all their songs (like I search for specific songs and they don't come up) and now I can't edit a photo on this app. This app is so annoying! And the new UI sucks by the way.

Layout of the app isn't bad, but I find that it's not quiet consistant. I've looked at Facebook on two other phones/accounts and it hasn't been the same once. Some settings are also difficult to alter. Also, it would be nice if you could enter your own type of relationship for family, instead of just selecting the ones provided. I have an umpa (biological uncle, but like my grandpa) but I can't list him as such, and I can't list his wife as my nana even though thats what they are to me.

New "upgrade" to marketplace couldn't be worse. More than half the "local" listings are not local and have to be shipped. There is no way to change this and I've tried multiple times. "Saves" are now bookmarks and all the navigation buttons are tiny icons next to each other. It's completely convoluted, much more than before. Surely this update can't have been driven by humans. Also really despise disappearing task bars and what is the purpose of moving the main nav from the top to the bottom?

Sadly this app has been getting worse. We cannot post certain things/words, they added nicknames which I'm not a fan of, the amount of ads is awful, and now the app crashes every time I try to look at comments. It will probably all get worse. I'm saving all my photos just in case. now I cannot even get Facebook to open because it's down for everyone.

June 2026 update is super buggy. the UI has been change a bit so it took time to figure it out, but my biggest pet peeve is the app is buggy when trying to post or comment on the platform. The text box shows up and disappears at random quite a bit. In one post, I actually clost the chat box 7 times before it stopped popping back up. I'm waiting for the platform to start getting better again, but I feel that may be a long ways off.

Really? Pop up ads? It's bad enough that every third post is an ad, and half of the actual posts include paid advertisements, but now you're doing pop up ads? I thought I was going crazy at first when the post I'd be looking at jumped down and an ad replaced it, so I started paying attention, and sure enough, an ad that wasn't there before popped in as I was looking at another ad. I hardly use your platform, but it may be time to fully move on.

Couldn't pull up comments or view notifications after trying to pull them up. Restarted app and phone. Nothing changed. Deleted and reinstalled app and now I can't log in at all. I can go through my browser or log in from my computer, but the app on both my phone and tablet just says loading and takes me right back to the log in page. I don't even know why I use Facebook anymore. It gets worse with every update. *updating as of 4/27/2026: same issue on a different update, years later.

They rolled out a new look that only some of us have right now (against our will) and I hate it! The term "Social Media" was built on the idea of sharing and connecting over things we find in common, interesting, cute, or funny, etc, but there's been a massive shift in philosophy. So, now instead of being able to post watchable links that people can scroll to see... only tiny malfunctioning boxes that have to be clicked to be seen are being displayed. A cold change that makes me want to leave.

getting worst and worst. they now have moved the navigation menu to "be in line with ios devices" but have made it less desirable in my opinion. should have the choice of having it top vs bottom, or leave it alone at the top where navigation is supposed to be. application is very bloaty, and is constantly trying to access things it shouldn't be on the phone.

App constantly crashes, plays video when you click the comments, when you're watching a video it will randomly throw you to a video you watched 20mins ealier and not even in the same video lineup not to mention there is an add on everything. If I could give negative 10 stars I would. EDIT: Now the comment section is blank.. New as of June 15 2026, you can't even watch more than one minute at a time of a video without a 30 second ad. It is soo bad now.

So annoyed about the new update opening to reels automatically! Either update so I can choose what I want to open the app to, my news feed or friends, or go back to the default being news feed. It is so overstimulating and if I forget to turn the volume off, its super loud. I am basically using Instagram and Forum (which I love!) until this is changed.

I haven't had Facebook in 3 weeks. No warning, no email communication from Facebook or Meta. I've tried to uninstall, reinstall, I've turned my phone off and on, cleared cache, history, cookies and nothing has worked. Every time I click on my profile it says it has sent me a code but either the code doesn't work or the code never arrives. I've had Facebook for years and have never experienced problems like this.

Annoying, I thought this was an amazing app, and it's the only social media app I can have. Then I tried scheduling a post. Apparently it's only for people with professional accounts I guess. People shouldn't need to switch from a personal account for an apps stupid choices. I want this fixed. Also MAKE A DRAFTS FOLDER! I want to be able to easily access my unpublished drafts across multiple platforms and not just my phone through a notification. Fix this or I stop using it, it's impractical.

I hate what you have done with Facebook. especially marketplace. I used to be able to go in and Mark that I only wanted local listings, no shipping. But now even if you hit local all you get are items that have to be shipped and I refuse to pay somebody that I cannot pick my merchandise up from and pay in person, not to charge with how outrageous and expensive everything else is but to add shipping on top of it? hell no. There's got to be something better.

Facebook has connected people in a way that is unmatched and I appreciate how much it has to offer, especially the marketplace! Im having to make a NEW page currently because too much time has gone by where I didn't utilize the book. What I struggle with is multiple accounts, and not just with Facebook but with Google and other apps. I've wanted the good people at Facebook and Google, etc. to help me clean everything up. Interestingly, it almost seems like these things are manifest in my life

Took what could have been an amazing website, and turned it into, essentially a trash app. I would rate this zero stars if I could. First, took away the timeline. Then, jumbled up everything so I can't tell what's new, old, etc. Now, want to, again move the home, notification, etc. bar to the bottom, when they were told it looks like absolute shot? Keep that bar at the top, and I will raise this a half star. Move it,.or force move, I will go back to using it only on my PC.

Even when the setting is turned off, this app stays active in the background. I do not receive notifications and it has no permissions, yet it doesn't close, even when I clear it in my tabs menu. As if that weren't enough, I don't even see any people or pages that I follow anymore. I opened the app and counted one day and I saw 21 ads and/or "suggested" pages before seeing someone I follow. This is a waste of time and they just mine your data to sell it. And why is the bar at the bottom now?!

Tries to force connections. I talk to the same 5 people. Quit forcing others to the top of the list whenever I go to share something. I am tired of constantly having to search for the same 5 conversations every single time. At least give me the option to pin them to the top. Edit: Still does the above, but the "continue watching" popping up every couple minutes while actively browsing reels is just annoying.

The reels are broken, I go to open comments and suddenly I can't see the video. I close comments and suddenly the video restarts. Some times the page/username and caption are gone. Other times the video timer is missing. Please fix this, it is very frustrating. Update: previous problem still exists and now when I open comments on anything they won't load.

it's glitchy now. I think it's due to an overload of the ads. Every time that I try to type on Facebook app, my keyboard disappears and it doesn't pop back up. the buttons don't respond instantly. the reels keep buffering and skipping with all all bars of service. I've uninstalled, reinstalled. cleared my phone's cache, the keyboard cache and the app's cache. it's still glitchy.

Just long in and seems as they botched an update. Total outage, you can not login, or do anything, app crashed when trying to login. They need to hire real developers to fix their slop code. However that is a far fetched, It was never really a good app to begin with my last post: Such a terrible app, they constantly censure your posts, they when you block another account, congratulations the next 6 weeks all you will see is content from that blocked account.

Links always open in the in app browser even though the setting to use the external browser is turned on. It's stupid that setting only applies to messages and not posts. toast popups at the bottom of the app cover up the navigation/menu bar now that that's been moved to the bottom of the screen. you can't interact with it until the popup disappears. too many ads, too many "suggestions"(friends, posts, groups pages) that can't be disabled entirely.

Marketplace is Broken. I have a listing which I marked as pending. Now I can't see the listing in my "Sell" page. I can only see "Available" listings. I cannot change my listing from pending to sold, so it will just sit there forever as pending. Or at least until yall fix your bugs. Why make it so hard to use the basic functions of your app? What happened to having a good user experience?

I just don't understand why developers just keep making things worse and worse. Recently they made it so you can't pause the short, instead it shows the first frame. Many stupid videos go too fast and now I can't pause them to see. Just now I noticed I can't pause a short and then look at comments. Clicking comments automatically restarts the video and the pause button is nearly impossible to hit.

terrible and unsafe! makes it impossible to log out, notifications are relentless even when you don't have anyone texting or friending you. I tried logging in with my email and it takes me to someone else's account linked to a completely different email that i have, automatically after asking for confirmation with numbers and email. I'll never trust this app again, and anyone who values their privacy and information will do the same. As if it wasn't enough with them selling all your info.

10 years later, I can't increase this rating. The latest update makes it harder to log out. The feed updates when it chooses, no matter what I'm looking at. The algorithms definitely work because I watch a video or two and suddenly that topic is all I see. I have to search out other interests because this is what Facebook thinks I want. Too bad there isn't a better or just as popular social media platform.

App is completely unstable far too often. Any time I refresh, it opens the menu pane to the left. The tabs don't know if they want to be in the top or the bottom from day to day. My notifications are out of order or they are linked if I receive a reply within the same post, i can't see both comments only the recent one. The text box gets stuck after entering in a reply and pressing the back button takes you out of the comment and back to the top. Highly frustrating

every time I have to redownload this app for whatever, it has somehow gotten worse. the settings tab is impossible to find. it only gives you access to your profile and your feed, all other settings have been hidden. the app is a nightmare to use, with videos automatically playing at full volume and ads coming at you from all directions. immediately uninstalled

Edit I made this review 2 years ago and it has just gotten progressively worse. Every video buffers constantly, profiles and comments buffer and refuse to load. the ads are out of control. multiple ads in videos and pop up windows at the bottom blocking the video. I've had Facebook since 2011 I remember when it was a great app. now it's just a marketing cesspool that requires constant updates and still doesn't work.

If I set a photo to "friends only" or even "only me" and it shows up in my "view as public" profile it's a major red flag. Meta doesn't prioritize your safety and security. Worst most un-intuitive user interface of all social media Apps. It's a maze of seemingly redundancy where features are often hidden to prevent the user from controlling their own content.

so many bugs. it's horrible. now when watching reels a smaller video pops up in the middle of screen. it's usually a past video or a suggested reel. sometimes it goes away but it's just consistently getting worse. and the ads! omg the ads are horrible and repetitive and just far too often to actually use Facebook anymore. I chose to pay for YouTube because Facebook is just going down hill quickly.

I'm frustrated with the number of ads and suggestions showing up in my feed for topics not related to anything my FB friends post. Also, I've noticed pages I'm supposedly following that I don't actually follow. I have gone through setting to figure out what to do and how to stop. Yeah, it doesn't work! At this point, i just won't have an FB account. It's not freaking worth it, people!

I use fb for messaging and that's it. if you want a good experience with videos and comment interaction go to literally any other app. FB gets crazy glitchy with every update. Comment replies going to the wrong person (sometimes even gets put onto another post somehow), and 14 hours out of 24 when I try to reply to someone it won't tag their name, and when I try to do it manually the name won't show up. I get none of these issues with YouTube. Good for messaging, terrible media app.

They're sort of getting away from the support inbox, and they have a new feature. That's at your profile picture. That's called profile status. Sometimes you can correct the problem right. erase it and in 24 hours. Your profile is back to normal. But people still don't realize in their support. Inbox, which is over on the drop down list where the settings is. They need to go there and see what violations they have and try to get them corrected. Because they stay with you for a very long time.

My account got hacked a few years after high school and I didn't bother with it for a long time. Recently I tried to log back in and recover it, and I did get into my account for 1 week, before I got kicked again because somehow the password is different again. And the "image verification AI" now says I can't be verified, and my phone number and backup email are no longer connected. Trash all around if it's still this easy to steal people's accounts.

Facebook started yesterday afternoon closing down every few seconds. I was reading a post, wanted to leave a comment and it closed out. Opened the app back up to see that it had refreshed to something completely different. I had to search for the post again and clicked on the comment tab again only to have it close out again. This morning, it closes out every few seconds of me trying to open it up. And each time it gives me this app is not working box and asks if I want to close the app.

I use Facebook often and I keep having stupid issues with the app. For example, right now I can't access the menu in the top left corner to check my groups right now. Last week it kept deleting posts I put up. Another time the search wasn't working for marketplace. Too many bugs, if my family wasn't in the app I would stop using it. #FedUp

Account gets hacked. I delete a post. Even though it's in the archives, or trash, sometimes I still see it. A week later, I still see the post I've deleted. X-rated sites are suggested on my page, and I didn't want the suggestion. I request that fewer feeds pop up, and I still see them. Add pop up, and I don't need them. I do like how fb allow one to connect with each other. The games are nice to play. I can connect app games with fb and get extra bonuses. Update5/19/ My account is hacked again.

I've had this app since forever, and NOW it's when it's acting up. I haven't been able to add a song to my notes section for a few days now—I could only write something. I have never had a problem with this feature until now. Yesterday, I performed the latest software update on my phone (Galaxy S25+) with the One UI 8.5. Please fix this issue. I like having a song playing in the notes section of my inbox.

Too many updates, everytime I turn around there is another update. I don't need to update that often. Also even though I turned off the notification for updates it still does. VERY ANNOYING!!!! Plus my feed is now 90% ads instead of the actual pages or people I follow. I would add that even though I block an unwanted ad it doesn't stay blocked UPDATE app has suddenly decided to glitch everytime I try to read a comment or watch a video. Just updated the app so this is a result of that

Worst customer support I've ever experienced. I pay for verified to receive enhanced support. However, after their system returned an error twice, I've been timed out of asking for enhanced support, even though I never spoke to anyone. The initial problem was that my business profile was suspended from recommendation erroneously by their horrible automated AI moderating. no idea what it saw, but even Meta told me it was an error. still no resolution. been a week so far.

Posts missing from pages, despite seeing them, liking & commenting when they appear on my timeline. When i go to the page & select show ALL, the reel isn't there. Also, I hate seeing posts from days ago - I want to see current posts not old ones. Please give us the option to see posts in chronological order that we can set so it stays that way until we, the user, wishes to change it back. Seeing posts from 3 days ago is pointless. Way too many suggested posts from groups/people I don’t follow.

I go on FB to keep up with certain friends & family but miss almost all posts from most of the friends I have on there due to my feed being flooded by random accounts/groups that I don't follow or am apart of. Most are "suggested". I like to watch the reels but the amount of ads make that impossible and piss me off. It didn't used to be this bad. It's basically a pointless app to have now. I miss anything by the people I know in real life.

It should integrate Messenger, no longer retain it as a separate app, but not Whatsapp. The app refreshes too often, to the point that one is afraid to accidentally close it because you can't find the last post anymore. The comment option "all", "most relevant" and "newest" is the most annoying thing ever. Just put all comments by default and then give the chance for the others.

Still the Best Social App! Facebook continues to be a great platform for staying in touch with friends, discovering events, joining groups, and sharing memories. I love how easy it is to post updates, browse photos, and interact with content. The Marketplace is super useful, and the ability to follow pages and interests keeps my feed engaging. It's a one-stop place for social connection. Highly recommended! 👍

Could fb please get a button or something so that when you minimise it to look at something else, it doesn't automatically reset your page. I would like to at least have the option of watching what I was busy with. Or what would be even better is seeing the last few things of what I interacted with. So many times I'm looking at something good and then bam, lose it and can't find it again. This is on the phone fb app for clarity. I hate using most apps on laptop

Heya! 😸 I've been experiencing a problem with this app lately; I'm unable to open the app no matter what I do 🥹. I've cleaned up my storage, cache, and even reinstalled the app. When I reinstalled it, I was able to access it and used it for a while. However! The next time I tried opening it, the same problem occurred again. It kept closing automatically every time I clicked the app icon. I hope this'll be fixed soon, I've seen multiple people's reviews with the same problem as me. 🫠

I liked it at first because it was a good way to keep in touch with friends and family, but now it's constantly suggested posts filling up my feed with a bunch of stuff I don't care about. Now all of the reels have SO many ads that you can't skip so it's not enjoyable to watch. Like a 6 minute video can have over 4 ads and when you scroll it's an ad every 2 videos. It's ridiculous, I only really keep my account for messenger, everything outside of that is just not enjoyable anymore

I don't know what you've changed, but my phone keyboard keeps appearing as I'm scrolling my feed, with an odd border around the screen. And if I switch away and back again as I'm in the middle of writing a post it just drops back to the feed, losing whatever I'd written. Notifications seem super delayed, as well, with some appearing in the app literally hours after the other person did something and I'd just been on a few minutes earlier looking.

I really enjoy seeing who views my stories—it's one of my favorite features. However, I've noticed that when I check my Story Archive, I can only see who reacted to the story, not everyone who viewed it. It would be a huge improvement if Facebook allowed users to see all viewers of a story, even after a few days, regardless of whether they left a reaction or not. Keeping that information available longer would make the experience much better.

it's Facebook in alls it's good and bad. however, it's becoming a overall negative experience. you see more tending Facebook posts than your friends, the algorithm puts random things that you may or may not care about and there are tons of ads. worst part is they put ads in the middle of videos on top of all the ads you scroll past. I get I'm not the customer but I no longer watch videos when they are interrupted by more ads. at least give me usable videos between the scroll ads.

I wish I didn't have to use it. video live streams don't work right. I try and watch it horizontally on my phone and the app places half the screen beneath my phone. the top half of the video is the bottom half of my screen. when I try and vertically align it after that point the video is switched and will keep playing the wrong video no matter how many times I try and get back into it. That's on top of all the other well-known garbage that Facebook shoves in your feed instead of what you want

What is going on with Facebook. I just happened to check out my profile and settings, and to my surprise, my settings have been completely changed somehow! So then I spent an hour going through different settings and changing them to what I want them to be only to realize that nothing changed! I selected the buttons and confirmed the changes, thinking that Facebook did what it said, but apparently Facebook does what it wants to now, like it or not! This is criminal territory.

pretty terrible anymore. it's ad after ad. in between ads are recommended pages. just a few of the things and people I follow show up in between. I spend more time selecting show less than enjoying any part of it. I will also randomly find that I'm following pages I've shown no interest in, not even the content on the page. Completely random slop. when watching a video and trying to look at the description it'll kick you out multiple times to show you the ads on the bottom.

I'm changing my review. When I encountered my first unskippable ad I hated it, but after encountering more of them I've had a change of heart. I love these unskippable ads, they're great at breaking the spell of mindless scrolling, reminding me that I could be doing something better with my time. Every time I'm forcibly halted by ads I immediately close Facebook. It's fantastic. I know that sounds like sarcasm but it's really not. Best Facebook improvement in years.

When I click on share to a friend's profile, it doesn't show all of my available friends, only a very limited list. I know more of my friends allow the sharing of posts on their page. I can do it when I copy and paste the link directly, but not when I'm using the share to a friend's profile function. This is very annoying

Useless platform. Changed my phone and number. I am able to log in with my email and password. However, this two-way authenticator blocks me, and there are no other options to bypass. Tried a few things and spent 3 days trying to figure it out. However unssucessful. Facebook has no contact or methods to fix this issue other than providing your ID. But if you use an alias, or different last name you're doomed. I will not open another account and it appears this is a big problem with many people.

Sometimes I use it. I do have a question about the app though: Why does it have to be a system app? I'm editing this to add something. For some reason, when you have the option for auto update off, it will still perform an auto update. It even auto updates when you're on Wi-Fi as I've seen it try to update, but won't as it says waiting for Wi-Fi in order to update. Even removing all updates it will inevitably update without your permission.

I hate getting "new" notifications for posts that are 3 days old but the notification says it was just posted minutes ago. checked all my settings within my phone and Facebook and everything is setup right. A lot of the time I end up missing important information because Facebook decides to push notifications 3 days later and label it as a "just posted"

FB had butchered what used to be great. I rarely see my actual "friends" posts. It's filled with content it believes i want to see but don't. It filters my notifications by what it seems important. If I AT ALL watch a video, it's subpar algorithm shows me non stop the same or same type of video. I've kept due to family and pictures but have weened. Won't be active much longer.

This app needs a huge update! Notifications are severly late! When you post you can't even see what you post. And then you cant even see the comments until an hour or so later! No one sees your group post because Facebook doesn't show it and for lack of delays! too many ads and videos in time line. It also doesn't load correctly at times. On the iPad the Facebook post are black. Ridiculous

the sheer volume of adverts is horrendous. In a 2 minute video there can be 6 ads. they last longer than what I'm watching. They are also often interstate/international ads that have no bearing on where I'm located. I've now noticed ads in my notifications!! don't use Facebook anywhere near as much as I used too. very poor form.

Facebook has become unrecognizable from what it once was. I login today and 9 out of every 10 posts are ads (recommendations for pages I'm not following and random video reels are considered ads). I find it incredibly difficult to tailor my experience to actually seeing posts from friends, or anything I'm actually interested in. it's like the Internet in the 90's without ad blockers. this is just really such a terrible awful social network that does not function as a social network anymore.

Facebook is getting worse and worse. I've never had a problem with the fact there has to be adds before, but my feed doesn't even feel like it belongs to me anymore. I am inundated with rubbish (adds and suggested pages of nonsense that I have absolutely no interest in). I have the app to see my friends Facebook, not a load of useless spam!

I can't stand the reels flash banging me every time one of them is HDR enabled. The fact that FB doesn't provide a way to turn HDR off in its settings is absolutely ridiculous. You'll be in bed at night, in the darkness of your room, on your dark mode enabled phone watching some reels and than BAM! You're blind for the next few seconds. Please fix this.

whatever is going on, it's been almost unusable the last week or so. I've tried twice to uninstall and reinstall, but the app keeps freezing and then closing. I can't even make it thru my new feeds to read. this is on an Android tablet, and now my Android smartphone, and also a Fire tablet is doing the same, so it's not just my device.

The mobile app is hot garbage. Notifications not loading, messages from the notifications not loading, marketplace almost never showing items near me despite the small radius I chose, the send message button is gone now unless you minimize your keyboard and almost entirely back out of a comment. Seriously terrible, but so is the desktop version. This website sucks and it's barely functional.

App doesn't allow switching between already created facebook profiles instead tries to force you to create a new one. Always has problems. Atleast tiktok has the correct algorithm. **update** since the new update doesnt even work anymore just constantly crashes. supposed to be and excellent app after being around for so long. wish there was a better platform.

The default feed is pretty bad now. You scroll through so many ads and recommended pages just to see maybe 2-3 of your friends. You can't zoom in on pictures once you click on them. Video controls are non-existent once you click on a video that's in the comments. There's definitely a LOT of room for improvement

I've had to uninstall and re install this app multiple times today. It keeps showing old posts from days or even weeks ago and refuses to refresh. "you're all caught up for now" keeps popping up when that clearly is not true. When I try sharing/forwarding a fb post to messenger, it says "chats unavailable right now" (and no, I'm not blocked by the person I'm sending it to). FIX THIS! I also dont get notifications until days later the last few months. 90% of my newsfeed is ads or sponsored posts.

Facebook really needs to work on their app. i am very annoying with i open the app as im listening to YouTube music, and it just pauses it. i get that when i a video with a sound pause ot but every time i open facebook, it stops my music. also, if im watching a video and i close out of the app to go to a different app, the sound just keeps going in the background as if facebook was still open. i have to 100% close the app to stop it. Facebook used to be a great app,but it became a great pain.

Samsung galaxy s23 ultra Auto correct is aggressive af. It's constantly changing your to you're. Facebook hangs up while trying to edit text. Trying to keep up with conversation is incredibly difficult because comments are automatically hidden. This app is going back to the days when you needed a laptop to do anything.

reinstalled the app, because I apparently need it to keep in touch with family, and after a few days of using it, I set it down so I could have a nap, and the reel I was on before I set it aside STARTED PLAYING AT FULL VOLUME!!! I woke up, my neighbors were probably concerned, and I'm pretty sure it could've woken the dead.

Incomplete app, you'll have to install messenger separately despite getting notifications just fine in the app. Horribly optimized app takes up 2GB despite messenger being in a separate app- one of the largest apps on my phone and it requires an additional app for full functionality. It's ridiculous, just use the web and you'll be better off.

I have the app set to never autoplay videos, and to never start videos with sound. Recently, videos in my feed are automatically playing, and with sound. I double checked my app settings, still set on "Never Autoplay Videos". Why can't this billion dollar tech company just make an app that works right?

Somebody from China was allowed to access my account, change my email and password associated, and there is zero support that can help me access it again. I've lost pictures from my childhood, lists of friends, and I'm so angry that there's no technical support to be contacted about this. Horrible app, wish I'd have never relied on it for picture storage.

Since customer support doesn't exist, maybe just maybe this will get noticed. I keep getting shown one video over and over again. A dozen times, I have gone through the steps of "not interested" then "hide video." It kept showing, so I blocked the page thinking, surely it'll stop coming up now, but it still shows up all over my reels. When I go to the page, it doesn't show me the page, so it's still blocked and thus not mirror/bot accounts. How do I get rid of this video???

New feature: ads in the middle of videos. I get if you HAVE to put them between videos, but SEVEN ads in a 20 minute video is ridiculous. So my new thing is I'll NEVER purchase anything through Facebook as long as this is happening, and if there's absolutely any alternative to a brand that advertises there, I'll go with that.

ADS ADS ADS! the app has already been ad ridden for years, especially the "reels", heck you go to watch a 10 second reel and halfway through you get hit with a 2 min ad, this ain't YouTube, we're not watching full length videos here! They're barely even clips! Then, whatever they've done recently has made it even worse! Just scrolling through the main feed, LITERALLY every third post is an AD! It's sickening how incessant ADs are in everything we do. It's just one big AD with occasional posts

Not sure why but after updating this app earlier today, I now cannot press any link to read a story etc ... without it saying close app and won't allow me to open anything up on Facebook at all. I have two phones and therefore will hold off updating that one if this persists. Is anyone else having this issue. Not a problem before I updated.

The refresh frequency on Android is way too frequent now. Literally every time I switch apps, even just for a split second to test this, the feed refreshes. This needs to be fixed ASAP, because it makes me not want to use the app, if I'm always losing my place.

I've been a user of WhatsApp since its launch. It's one of my most used apps and totally essential for communication with family and friends. It has been very stable and easy to use since the beginning. I've found very few issues with the app. But recently I noticed that the app's Automatic Translation feature is quite broken - messages don't get translated automatically, and the app keeps prompting me to select the language though it's already downloaded and selected.

notifications are now showing up as "WhatsApp: Jane Doe: message" it's a bit frustrating and unnecessary. On a positive note, I do appreciate the transcribe feature that was added on for voice messages. I'm not usually able to hear them quickly, so being able to read them helps. It does need a bit of work here and there.

I guess its a good app , if I can figure it all out , my account got restricted on my very first use after I downloaded it a few days ago , then it was totally banned from doing anything other than answering messages , I couldn't start a chat or do anything else until my account got reviewed for some reason , but it seems to be working at the moment .... we'll see how it goes over the next few days.

For more than a week now, I've been getting delayed notifications, and I'm talking several days later. No updates available or anything, so what's going on??? I normally would not subtract 4 stars for one issue. However, this is a HUGE flaw, a major function of this app should not be malfunctioning. What a FAIL!

I downloaded this app to chat with a business, but every day it locks my account and makes me request a review. I'm getting no feedback about what to change. It gets unlocked every day, but then I send one message the next day and I get the same result. I'm trying to uninstall and reinstall on my phone today to see if that helps. Either way it's been an extreme pain so far.

In my own opinion, WhatsApp is a great app for communicating with family and any communities, it's pretty simple and easy to use once you understand the settings, but it would be better if there was an in-app browser, similar to messenger, for whenever someone sends a link, and you don't have to go into chrome or any browser app you have, since I've noticed in both the reviews and the people I know who use WhatsApp, they'd prefer in-app browsers as well. But overall, a really easy to use app!!𔘓

I used to love WhatsApp even back when it had a subscription cost of a dollar per year. I had no problem paying for it back then because it was so amazing! Nowadays , it's chock full of little features that are geared towards dumbing down our society even more. We don't need AI thinking for us and we definitely don't need it integrated into a messaging system. And I don't need little stickers flashing where my keyboard swap button sits when I'm trying to go back to keyboard from emoji's.

Several annoying bugs have crept in recently, and it's impossible to report these. This is unacceptable for such a widely used app. On the Pixel Watch 3 one can choose to not receive notifications while the phone is unlocked. This works in every app except WhatsApp, so the watch vibrates for every message, even as I'm replying. Annoying and a big battery drain. Group chats also constantly notify me that I've been added, even though I'm already a member. Why is it so hard to report bugs?

Whatsapp has begun delaying my messages anywhere between 8-24 hours(sometimes longer) and I cannot chat with my friends as a result. I don't know what you guys are doing over there, but please get it together. If it is maintenance, then NOTIFY US! If servers are down or overloaded, NOTIFY US! stop leaving users in the dark every time something happens with the app Edit:04/24/26 the issue is still happening. out of 4 people. only 1 message sent then went back to not sending

The app is overall very nice. But I've recently started to face a problem with the new avatar feature. My WhatsApp is up to date, but it doesn't show the avatar option in the settings. But when I go to search in settings and type "Avatar" it shows the option. And when I click on the option, nothing happens. So I'm not able to use the avatar feature due to this issue. Rest is okay.

WhatsApp is in general good but has some disadvantages. Firstly, it automatically deleted messages I try to send many times and does not let me edit messages when I typed something wrong, showing a completely different message. Apart from that, it has a feature which lets you post things happening with music on it. The voice recordings are high quality and there isn't much delay ( apart from whenever I try to edit a message) Overall, very good

I've been using Whatsapp for years now, and it's a very good way to communicate with others! but there's one problem that there's this profile picture glitch that only one contact can't see my picture and neither do I,the problem is we didn't block each other or excluded each other, I hope you fix this problem soon! overall the app is very powerful and useful.

Currently using the "lock immediately" feature on WhatsApp and every time I enter my code to open the app it closes and it takes a couple tries before I amablento fully use the app. Also, I get notified of a message, when I go to check the message isn't there, but the notificattion still is, then I have to exit the app multiple times and go back to finally recieve the message. Please fix as it is frustrating to use.

This app is super great! I use it to talk to my friends and family. Depside a few occasional glitches (the worst one being voice messages glitching my screen and not playing properly), it works well. I like this app because my house doesn't have enough signal to use normal messages most of the time, and I can acess my chats on all my devices. 5 stars from me! :)

This has the potential to be an amazing app, but it just has so many flaws. For starters, it only works and syncs all the messages about 5% of the time, which makes it rarely useful. I think the worst part is that it messes with WhatsApp notifications so much. I either don't even receive them, or get them about 3 days after they were sent (if I'm lucky). I tried many tricks to make it work again, but nothing seemed to fix it. I got notifications completely normally after I uninstalled.

I love this app. It’s very easy to use, and I’ve been using it for years to stay connected with the people I love. But I really wish there was a feature that allows us to access call history in a deeper way....like being able to download or save parts of our voice calls or video calls (with permission, of course😅). Sometimes very wholesome and meaningful moments happen during calls, and we don’t think to record them at the time.

This is an all round great app. Would be 5 stars but I have a major issue that started a while ago. About 2 days ago, after sending 2 videos successfully, no videos would send anymore. I cleared the cache, I deleted all the media in every "sent" folder in WhatsApp's media folder. And yet still, no videos want to send. it loads and keeps on loading, not even making progress, on my notifications bar it says for example "Sending 3 videos". But they don't. Truly disappointing WhatsApp.

I like the app, but something about searching for music when adding to my status is kind of bothering me. I was wondering if you can make it able for us to search for music with the artist and song name at the same time because when I search for a song it's hard to find it because a lot of songs have a similar name or when I'm searching for an artist but can't find the song because they have too many songs. please improve it.

I use WhatsApp every single day to stay connected with my family, friends, and even for work matters. I really appreciate how easy it is to send voice notes, photos, documents, and even make quick calls without any hassle. It feels reliable and personal, and honestly, it’s the one app I know I can’t live without.

I used to appreciate this app alot, still do. But now that it's becoming very common for more and more people to use this app for calls aswell, it's become very obvious to me that -after all these years- the quality for voice calls is still unacceptable. There seems to be a constant risk of WhatsApp repeatedly "reconnecting to the network" even if both/all participants have full network signal. This applies to both, mobile internet aswell as WiFi. Very disappointing, would give 5* otherwise.

I travel a lot so it's helped me keep in touch with ppl. The only complaint I have is that there are glitches with calling or text sounds. Quite often someone says they've been trying to call me and I see the notification but it didn't ring. Also, it would be nice if a deleted or edited message didn't say deleted /edited

Update mid '25. I have used WhatsApp for ages now, but still, they haven't sorted out yet a better solution for the storage of the media sent over the chats. Why a different folder for WhatsApp media? Why do you force me to have a photo I already have in my phone (because I took it) also in the "sent" folder as a duplicate? Also, the new video limit of size/duration is a nightmare. You don't even storage people's media, what's you problem? that's just annoying

It is basically the best communication app I've ever used since four years ago. I liked to create stickers and statuses for my family on my contacts. I can definitely texted myself to avoid accidentally texting somebody else so awkwardly. The only thing I dislike was when a random stranger called my number unexpectedly and I had to block him/her. I would recommend this app to anyone who wants to connect family and friends instantly. 👍🏻💚💯

WhatsApp is one of the most reliable messaging apps out there. It’s fast, user-friendly, and works well even on slower networks. The end-to-end encryption gives peace of mind when it comes to privacy, and features like voice/video calling, media sharing, and status updates make it more than just a texting app. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Group chats, broadcast lists, and voice notes are super convenient. WhatsApp Web is also a great addition for those who work on laptops.

The photo sending function is rather messed up after the update, despite clicking on "view more" to see all of my folders I only get a handful. Accidentally sending gifs while scrolling or without adding a caption is rather irritating due to the one click and send function and for the past few days whenever I search gifs I am met with "check your device's internet connection" which hardly goes away....

From my point of view, WhatsApp is a fantastic messaging app that makes it easy to stay in touch with friends and family. I appreciate its simplicity and the ability to send messages, share photos, and make voice or video calls for free. The end-to-end encryption gives me peace of mind about privacy. However, I also see the downside of constant notifications and the pressure to respond quickly. Overall, I think WhatsApp is a great tool for communication, as long as it’s used mindfully.

Recently, I've been having issues with sending messages to specific chats. I will open one chat and send the message, and it shows that it went elsewhere. I literally almost sent sensitive information to the wrong person, and no, I'm not mistaking the chats. This has happened a few times

My experience with WhatsApp has been pleasant until very recently. Since the last update, when I share any link in a message, I can no longer add any caption or comment about the link before sharing (unlike before). From now on, I have to edit to insert commentary after sharing to say something about the link. Please fix this issue ASAP. Thanks.

It was.. nice Now, it has become.. amazing. If I want to video Call my Family, then I would have to Message them first, Attempt to Audio Call once, Message again, Attempt to Video Call once again, Message again, Attempt to Audio Call once again & repeat many more times. After this, the Message is delivered & THEN I can video call my Family. Yeah.. Surprisingly, this Offer applies only when I want to call my Family. Restarting Phone doesn't help. Sometimes, I have to Normal Call. Thanks, Whatsapp

🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 Most useful messaging app ever! 💬✅ WhatsApp is my go-to app for chatting with friends, family, and classmates. It’s fast, simple, and works even on low networks 📶👏. I love features like voice messages, video calls, status updates, and group chats! 🗣️📞📸 The new privacy settings and disappearing messages are great too 🔒✨. Very helpful for school work, daily chats, and sharing photos or documents easily 📚📁. Only wish there were more fun themes or fonts, but overall it’s a must

The latest update which involves channels on Whatsapp is frustrating. It's a good idea but the way it's being arranged makes the interface not user friendly. I prefer the former version. I hardly find the status I want because of this so called channels thing update. Edit: The rearrangement makes sense now. I can access my contacts status and other features with ease currently. Thanks for the update.

I didn't give 5 stars for one reason. When I try to use the app in landscape mode, it is always glitchy and barely works. But other than that, I'm fully satisfied. Edit: Now there is another issue, there is a new list feature that was released a few weeks ago. I only had it for about a week, and it was gone. I tried restarting my WhatsApp, deleting it, and installing it again. Nothing worked. If this could be resolved,I would appreciate it.

Hello, the latest WhatsApp update has introduced changes that I find quite inconvenient. Earlier, status updates were displayed in a straightforward vertical list, which I preferred. Now, they’re arranged in a horizontal format, which feels less user-friendly. Additionally, the Updates tab is now filled with channels and their options, which I don’t find useful. The previous design was simpler and more practical. I hope WhatsApp reconsiders and brings back the older layout. Thanks

After I installed a client for Windows, it stopped working on my phone. It takes minutes to send or receive messages. Sometimes they never go. I just see a loading state of my messages. I tried cleaning the cache, reinstalling whatsapp, changing background power consumption settings. Basically, everything. I guess, I just need to drop a client on Windows as WhatsApp can only work on one device at a time. Since I can't send or receive messages, I put 1 star, until it is fixed.

Love this app. I have had it for years now and find it really easy to use. originally you couldn't download it to two devices. When I downloaded it to my tablet, it removed it from my phone. So I was happy when they changed that. I'm not sure why, but it feels more personal than text messaging. When I go to my contact list, it's like everyone is there and connected. Whereas in the texts list, it all feels impersonal and segregated. Texts are great for reminders from businesses and that's all.

I am not giving one star, but I think there should be a payment history feature on WhatsApp. When we open a person's profile, we can easily see photos, links, and documents shared in the chat, but there is no separate section for payments. Users have to scroll through the entire conversation to find a payment they made or received. Adding a dedicated payment history option in the profile would make it much easier to track and manage transactions.

I have been using WhatsApp for a long time, and I have noticed many changes and issues over time. In the beginning, WhatsApp worked perfectly, but later it started experiencing various glitches. For example, whenever I saved a contact number, it would appear as saved both in my phone and on WhatsApp. However, after closing and reopening WhatsApp, the contact would no longer appear as saved and would show as an unsaved number again "In addition, the process of sending messages downloading slow.

WhatsApp just keeps getting worse with every update over the years. Just stick to the base plan, if you don't know what else to implement 😑 Update: this version is even much worse. It seems to fail to detect my Internet connection sometimes. Other apps works flawlessly, but messages don't get sent at all. Until it seem to detect the network again then they send after being stalled for how long. You guys were much better and can do better. Simplicity was always the best

This app is very frustrating. In most apps, when you uninstall and reinstall them, your chats and history come back easily. But with WhatsApp, restoring chats is so complicated, and even after following all the steps, many messages still don't come back. Another annoying issue is that it fills up storage very quickly. If you uninstall the app even once, you can lose not only old chats but also photos and videos if they weren't backed up properly. The whole restore process is so complicated

Fix your last update, I used to be able to read the sender's name only, and now there is a "Whatsapp:sender" which is annoying af. Like I didn't know which app is sending the notification, the popup should only include the icon, sender's name, and a little bit of the message, we don't want or need the deam app's name that we already know, totally nonsense.

I really love WhatsApp, but I have one suggestion. Please add an option to edit status text after it's been posted. Sometimes I notice a typo or small mistake and have to delete the entire status and upload it again. It would be much better if we could simply edit the text without deleting the whole status. I hope you consider adding this feature. Thank you!

1) The web application is so frustrating to use. Cannot see the previous messages. Takes too much time to sync even though the app is open on the phone with an "active" internet connection. 2) Downloading media files is also a pain, as it takes forever to load! 3)Uploading an image to our status makes it blurred. This has been happening since 6 months now!!

Since today morning, my whatsapp is Unusable on my Samsung tablet (Android 8.1). Whenever I open the app, it flashes my chat list for a split second and then instantly crashes to a black screen with just the green header bar at the top. I am completely locked out of my messages. No other apps on my device are having this issue. I have tried everything to fix it: force stopping, clearing the cache, checking storage, and even doing a complete uninstall and reinstall. Nothing works.

Transferring data from old to new device is horrible. It just doesn't work for newer backups if you've used the app for a long time. I've been trying for several days, but I can't choose the google account from which I want to download the backup, so I'm just stuck on an old back up. I get errors with the "transfer over wifi" option as well. I'm also logged out of the desktop app while setting up, so I'm missing messages and can't respond. Terrible.

It's been a couple of hours since my app suddenly went blank. It went to a black screen and I can't do anything about it. I wish I could use this app properly again. I can only message someone from notifications,i could entered the app only if there's notification from someone,so i can touch that notification and entered the group or number. I really need you to help me

I have just updated the app on my tablet, but it opens and "blinks" continually. Can't use it there. That was on 24/6/26. Have restarted my device, security scanned device, the app is still misbehaving. Today 25/6/26, I checked app details in the app store, and there was an update available. updated the app...no change. The app is ok on my phone and laptop though. What a kerfuffle!

What the ecks going on as my pop up messages come up as WhatsApp instead of the contact name and it's doing it for all my friends. It's annoying because you have no way of avoiding a message if you busy and you have to click on the message then the other person knows you've read it. Get it sorted as it's frustrating!

WhatsApp is really simple and easy to use. I mainly use it to text people, make calls and send voice notes when I don’t feel like typing. It’s also good for group chats, especially with friends or family. The features like status updates, reactions and video calls make it more fun and convenient too. Overall, it’s just a smooth app that I use every day without any problem.

Im a tablet user, and the app is lagging, everytime i try to open, it closes, when i try to reopen it again, gives me black screen.. so im not longer access my chats or anything else. i reinstalled it TWICE and the problem is still the same. When i read the reviews i saw some other tablet users having the same issue so please consider us and our problem, because WhatsApp is an essential app and so many ppl uses it.

It is basically the best communication app I've ever used since four years ago. I liked to create stickers and statuses for my family on my contacts. I can definitely texted myself to avoid accidentally texting somebody else so awkwardly. The only thing I dislike was when a random stranger called my number unexpectedly and I had to block him/her. I would recommend this app to anyone who wants to connect family and friends instantly.👍🏻💚💯

I haven't been using the app for up to six months and it is giving me grave issues. About 2 weeks ago, I was shown "This account can't use WhatsApp". I looked at the reasons it can happenand I did nothing wrong. I requested a review and they restored my account but I lost all previous messages and that was terrible because I'm a student so I lost a lot of assignments and. Then I sent a message to a someone who number isn't saved and I saw it again. And today again, same issue. Ver

First starting using to text a friend in Germany and found other people I knew was using too, so set up a group and we can all join in and chat together in real time. I quite like it, can add documents, photos and files easily if needed and isn't difficult to use, which is a good thing, lol. 🤣 5 stars from me and highly recommend.

So far this apps were very important to me and I think to all people. I definitely recommended WhatsApp because easy to deal with people. I can sent massages, photos, videos, and documents instantly to anyone as long as I have a strong internet. I also can do a voice and videocalls to my family, friends , and beloved one with a high quality. In Whatspp, it also can sharing documents, PDFs, and other files quickly to the whom needed. It is so convenient to us in the new era.

The app has been glitching lately. The messages dissappear while talking to someone hand to hand, and appear so late that the receiver doesn't even notice that the message was sent. This app is very frustrating. In most apps, when you uninstall and reinstall them, your chats and history come back easily. I've been using this app for years now. Naturally I've collected a lot of data in form of pictures and chat logs in it. it's a very good app, that makes people to communicate from different countries and location it's also good by making one to have a vedio call to some one u haven't seen for couple of years. it also has a disadvantage, which is the use of data is very important, like it requires the use of data many people may not have data but they really want to use the app , but , because of the lack of data many people will go back to Facebook and other means of social media, like Instagram, Twitter etc, .:

I've been using Whatsapp since 2010. This is the most reliable, ad free, smooth and simple interface app I have ever used. I'd rate more than 5 stars if available. It's getting easier to use each day, with more and more newer options, and I want a new, extra option for now to be added. I need a separate "Everyone except..." option for last seen, online, and profile picture, so that everyone can see them, except some specific ones.

Hello WhatsApp Team, I am facing an issue with the “View Once” voice messages. When a single contact sends a view-once voice message, it works fine. Thank you.

WHY ARE THERE SO MANY CHANGES ON THE APP?? It almost feels like it's turning into a platform like Facebook or Instagram instead of a simple messaging tool. The status update is okay, but can we have an option to "hide channels" if you're not using not using the feature. Thank you.

I use WhatsApp every single day to stay connected with my family, friends, and even for work matters. It has a simple user interface. and I strongly recommend it..

I use this app daily, generally works well. But...Voice Chat...WhatsApp, what on earth were you thinking!? Hello WhatsApp Team, I would like to request that you add a Logout option in the WhatsApp app. Currently, users need to uninstall or take extra steps when they want to temporarily sign out. A simple logout feature would make account management easier, especially for people who switch devices or want to take breaks without deleting the app. Please consider adding this feature in a future update. Thank you for your work and support.

I used WhatsApp's "Change Number" feature, but my old number is still active. People can still message it, and my profile photo remains attached to the old account, creating privacy concerns. The feature didn't work as promised, and I have no way to fix it. Very disappointing experience.

I’ve used WhatsApp for years and it’s become essential. I love the end-to-end encryption, starred messages, disappearing chats, and HD photo/video sharing. Dear WhatsApp Team, First of all, thank you for continuously improving WhatsApp and introducing useful features like usernames. I truly appreciate your efforts. I would like to suggest one more privacy feature. Please consider adding a phone number visibility setting with options such as Public,Friends, and Only Me. This would give users greater control over who can view their phone number while making communication more secure and privacy-friendly.

It used to be an excellent professional communications app. But the latest introduction of one tap quick reactions to status triggers accidental messages (emojis) to be sent without any confirmation and there is no way to disable the quick reaction or add confirmation before a message is sent. IT IS 3:20 IN THE MORNING!!! I was just woken up by a chat backup which kept making a tone while the backup was being sent. Encryption's solid, that's it. Anyone with your number can message/call you by default. Link previews load automatically before you tap, media auto-downloads too — even after days offline, no consent asked. Links open in WhatsApp's own in-app browser instead of your choice. Real protections are buried and opt-in. Business accounts barely verified — scammers impersonate banks easily. 2FA often fails to activate. Encrypted ≠ safe.

WhatsApp is honestly one of the best messaging apps I've ever used. The app is fast, reliable, easy to use, and keeps improving with every update. It would make managing, deleting, or organizing large sticker collections much easier and save users a lot of time. Thank you for creating such an amazing app.

With the recent updates of WhatsApp... I've been having connection issues. A call rings for too long but it's only 3 seconds for the other person. Their contacts that don't have WhatsApp. My screen was locked, no way I could've added these random people. How secure is this app really? I beginning to wonder.

Very bad app, and honestly Meta apps keep getting worse instead of better. WhatsApp keeps glitching with archived chats.
